textByHashes.30527c1d22a114b56e3cce3d1a02e13b218156ee: What's so important you need to bother me with then?
textByHashes.45e7308a06bb0e79aea95605285a9d182d6b8920: Could have been anyone. The old man was an idiot. He's been asking for it for years.
textByHashes.ab52f1406f014c3185dd3669f51955e3f4d03cff: Not really. I don't have to justify myself to the likes of you, you know. I know the King personally you know. Now are we finished here?
textByHashes.4a5b385e49e75aec0b53d63a2c7e6a82f0a081e6: It's some thread. You're not very good at this whole investigation thing are you?
textByHashes.5bd65d167ec570705b6214bd79d7752e15019f6a: There was a nest of mosquitos under the fountain in the garden, which I killed with poison the other day. You can see for yourself if you're capable of managing that, which I somehow doubt.
textByHashes.7811ab7345c38fdbfbb95b3cc232143477bef1f5: Apparently you aren't as stupid as you look.
textByHashes.4e5342721cec87ffaf682f2167598058b1eadf2f: I can't believe we've finally arrived, I can't wait to explore!
textByHashes.7644f69a9bd959d9fe07fb21d6e1763ecc29e6d2: So much to see, I don't know where to start!
textByHashes.d29a2542557ee6ad03a435e030f31c74e955c968: A whole new continent to explore... what a time to be alive!
textByHashes.964af6766b6ceecbec9c8cdeb91b5938eaddf272: I overheard someone mention there are pirates and thieves here, be careful!
